name: Mini Oreo Magical Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve 20 cookies. Prepare brownie mix according to package directions. Stir in remaining cookies. Spread batter in a greased 12-inch pizza pan. Bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes or until done.
2. Sprinkle marshmallows over the top of the hot brownie; bake for 3-5 minutes more or until marshmallows are lightly browned. Sprinkle with nuts, candies and remaining cookies, pressing lightly into the softened marshmallows. Cool slightly on wire rack. Cut into wedges; serve warm or cool.
